ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient undergoing the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapist conducting the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken by the therapist during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., initial assessment, follow-up) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for motion capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_therapist_id FOREIGN KEY ("therapist_id") REFERENCES therapists ("therapist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for motion data entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session from which the data is collected */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the motion capture data point */,
  "left_shoulder_flex" REAL /* Flexion/Extension angle of the left shoulder */,
  "left_shoulder_abd" REAL /* Abduction/Adduction angle of the left shoulder */,
  "left_shoulder_rot" REAL /* Internal/External rotation angle of the left shoulder */,
  "left_elbow_flex" REAL /* Flexion/Extension angle of the left elbow */,
  "right_shoulder_flex" REAL /* Flexion/Extension angle of the right shoulder */,
  "right_shoulder_abd" REAL /* Abduction/Adduction angle of the right shoulder */,
  "right_shoulder_rot" REAL /* Internal/External rotation angle of the right shoulder */,
  "right_elbow_flex" REAL /* Flexion/Extension angle of the right elbow */,
  "left_elbow_abd" REAL /* Abduction/Adduction angle of the left elbow */,
  "left_elbow_rot" REAL /* Internal/External rotation angle of the left elbow */,
  "right_elbow_abd" REAL /* Abduction/Adduction angle of the right elbow */,
  "right_elbow_rot" REAL /* Internal/External rotation angle of the right elbow */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for this data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapists" (
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the therapist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the therapist */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the therapist (e.g., Physical Therapy, Occupational Therapy) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the therapist */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the therapist */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the therapist */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the therapist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("therapist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exercise */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video demonstration of the exercise */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for performing the exercise */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the exercise (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_exercises" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the exercise record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise prescribed */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the exercise was prescribed */,
  "repetitions" INTEGER /* Number of repetitions for the exercise */,
  "sets" INTEGER /* Number of sets for the exercise */,
  "rest_time" INTEGER /* Rest time between sets in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the exercise */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_exercises_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_exercises_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_exercises_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehabilitation_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rehabilitation goal */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the goal is set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the goal has been completed */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the goal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress towards the goal (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "therapist_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the therapist regarding the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rehabilitation_goals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session related to the report */,
  "overall_performance" REAL /* Overall performance score for the session (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the therapist */,
  "patient_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the patient */,
  "therapist_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the therapist */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video summary of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement analysis entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session related to the analysis */,
  "avg_left_shoulder_flex" REAL /* Average flexion angle of the left shoulder during the session */,
  "avg_left_shoulder_abd" REAL /* Average abduction angle of the left shoulder during the session */,
  "avg_left_shoulder_rot" REAL /* Average internal/external rotation angle of the left shoulder during the session */,
  "avg_left_elbow_flex" REAL /* Average flexion angle of the left elbow during the session */,
  "avg_left_elbow_abd" REAL /* Average abduction angle of the left elbow during the session */,
  "avg_left_elbow_rot" REAL /* Average internal/external rotation angle of the left elbow during the session */,
  "avg_right_shoulder_flex" REAL /* Average flexion angle of the right shoulder during the session */,
  "avg_right_shoulder_abd" REAL /* Average abduction angle of the right shoulder during the session */,
  "avg_right_shoulder_rot" REAL /* Average internal/external rotation angle of the right shoulder during the session */,
  "avg_right_elbow_flex" REAL /* Average flexion angle of the right elbow during the session */,
  "avg_right_elbow_abd" REAL /* Average abduction angle of the right elbow during the session */,
  "avg_right_elbow_rot" REAL /* Average internal/external rotation angle of the right elbow during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_analysis_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device data entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session related to the device data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Kinect, IMU) */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the collected data file */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device used */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the device (e.g., calibrated, not calibrated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, therapist, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
